<!-- Generated by box-gantry. DO NOT EDIT. -->
# Errors

Every I/O method is blocking and returns its value directly. Failures are
thrown as an unchecked `dev.unofficialbox.runtime.Runtime.BoxApiException` — either a
transport failure or a non-2xx response after the network layer's retries
(exponential backoff + jitter, `401` refresh, `Retry-After`). Because it extends
`RuntimeException`, you catch it only where you mean to handle it:

```java
try {
var file = client.files.getById(fileId, null);
} catch (dev.unofficialbox.runtime.Runtime.BoxApiException e) {
// inspect e.getMessage(); the body carries the Box error schema
}
```
